infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Townly uses your location to show nearby community reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Townly uses your location to send you alerts about reports near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Townly uses your camera to attach photos to reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Townly accesses your photos to attach images to reports.

plugins.photosPermission: Townly accesses photos to attach them to reports.
